/usr/bin/ar qc libsf_bridge.a CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/sf_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/attacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/bitboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/evaluate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/misc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/movegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/movepick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/nnue/features/full_threats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/nnue/features/half_ka_v2_hm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/nnue/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/nnue/nnue_accumulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/nnue/nnue_misc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/syzygy/tbprobe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/timeman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/tt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/tune.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/uci.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sf_bridge.dir/__/eval_backend/ucioption.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsf_bridge.a
